frameCount.note: Type(4) × Indicators(4) × Controls(3) × Size(3) = 144; combinaciones útiles = 36

ariaAttributes: Slide: role='group' + aria-roledescription='slide' + aria-label='Slide N of Total'
Indicators (dots): role='tablist' + role='tab' + aria-selected='true|false' en el activo
aria-live='polite' en container cuando autoplay=false (anuncia cambios)
keyboardNav: Tab: navega dentro del slide activo (skip hidden slides)
Enter/Space en indicator: jump a ese slide
a11y.focusTechnique: focus al prev/next button; hidden slides tienen inert para skip Tab

componentDescriptions.CarouselSlide:
Slide individual. State: default / active / transitioning.

🔑 ARIA: role='group' + aria-label='Slide N of Total'

WCAG 2.2 AA.
componentDescriptions.Carousel:
Rotación de slides con controls + indicators. Type: single (1 visible) / multi (varios visibles) / hero (banner full-width) / thumbnail (strip + main). Indicators: dots/lines/counter/none. Controls: arrows/none/both. Size: sm/md/lg.

🔑 ARIA:
• WAI-ARIA Carousel pattern
• role='region' + aria-roledescription='carousel'
• aria-live según autoplay

⌨️ Keyboard:
• Arrow keys navegan slides
• Home/End primer/último
• Tab skip hidden slides

🎯 Focus:
• Prev/next buttons focuseables
• Indicators con tablist pattern

Tokens: 18, prefijo crl-.
WCAG 2.2 AA.

Autoplay requiere botón pause (WCAG 2.2.2). Para single image usa Image; para gallery con lightbox considera Modal + arrows.

_decisions.why: Single = 1 slide visible (product galleries); multi = múltiples (recommended items row); hero = full-width banner; thumbnail = strip + main (e-commerce). 4 tipos cubren casos enterprise + consumer.
role='region' + role='group' per slide + aria-roledescription. Pattern canónico para carousel accessibility.
